CustomField.description: Date and Time of the last interaction : Call , Meeting (End date), or Newsletter sent
CustomField.formula: if( AND( OR(now()-CreatedDate < now()-Last_Event_attendance__c,isnull(Last_Event_attendance__c)), OR(now()-CreatedDate < now()-Last_Newsletter_sent__c,isnull(Last_Newsletter_sent__c)), OR(now()-CreatedDate < now()-Last_Meeting_Call__c,isnull(Last_Meeting_Call__c)) ), CreatedDate , if( AND( OR(now()-Last_Meeting_Call__c < now()-Last_Event_attendance__c,isnull(Last_Event_attendance__c)), OR(now()-Last_Meeting_Call__c < now()-Last_Newsletter_sent__c,isnull(Last_Newsletter_sent__c)), not(isnull(Last_Meeting_Call__c))), Last_Meeting_Call__c, if( AND( OR(now()-Last_Event_attendance__c < now()-Last_Meeting_Call__c ,isnull(Last_Meeting_Call__c )), OR(now()-Last_Event_attendance__c < now()-Last_Newsletter_sent__c,isnull(Last_Newsletter_sent__c)), not(isnull(Last_Event_attendance__c))), Last_Event_attendance__c, if( AND( OR(now()-Last_Newsletter_sent__c < now()-Last_Meeting_Call__c ,isnull(Last_Meeting_Call__c )), OR(now()-Last_Newsletter_sent__c < now()-Last_Event_attendance__c,isnull(Last_Event_attendance__c)), not(isnull(Last_Newsletter_sent__c))), Last_Newsletter_sent__c, CreatedDate))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date and Time of the last interaction : Call , Meeting (End date), or Newsletter sent
CustomField.label: Last Interaction
